item.title: Deconfined quantum critical points in fermionic systems with spin-charge separation
item.description:
Author(s): Niccolò Baldelli, Arianna Montorsi, Sergi Julià-Farré, Maciej Lewenstein, Matteo Rizzi, and Luca Barbiero

Deconfined quantum critical points are intriguing transition points not predicted by the Landau-Ginzburg-Wilson symmetry-breaking paradigm which are usually identified by the appearance of a continuous phase transition between locally ordered phases. Here, we reveal the presence of deconfined quantu…


[Phys. Rev. B 113, 165142] Published Thu Apr 23, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Author(s): Niccolò Baldelli, Arianna Montorsi, Sergi Julià-Farré, Maciej Lewenstein, Matteo Rizzi, and Luca Barbiero

Deconfined quantum critical points are intriguing transition points not predicted by the Landau-Ginzburg-Wilson symmetry-breaking paradigm which are usually identified by the appearance of a continuous phase transition between locally ordered phases. Here, we reveal the presence of deconfined quantu…


[Phys. Rev. B 113, 165142] Published Thu Apr 23, 2026
item.dc:title: Deconfined quantum critical points in fermionic systems with spin-charge separation
item.dc:creator: Niccolò Baldelli, Arianna Montorsi, Sergi Julià-Farré, Maciej Lewenstein, Matteo Rizzi, and Luca Barbiero

item.dc:subject: Electronic structure and strongly correlated systems
item.prism:section: Electronic structure and strongly correlated systems
item.description:
Authors: Niccolò Baldelli, Arianna Montorsi, Sergi Julià-Farré, Maciej Lewenstein, Matteo Rizzi, and Luca Barbiero

Last/corresponding-author proxy: Niccolò Baldelli, Arianna Montorsi, Sergi Julià-Farré, Maciej Lewenstein, Matteo Rizzi, and Luca Barbiero

Score 9/10 A_MUST_READ

Why: title strong match: spin-charge separation

Tags: #spin-chargeseparation #quantumcritical

Abstract: Author(s): Niccolò Baldelli, Arianna Montorsi, Sergi Julià-Farré, Maciej Lewenstein, Matteo Rizzi, and Luca Barbiero Deconfined quantum critical points are intriguing transition points not predicted by the Landau-Ginzburg-Wilson symmetry-breaking paradigm which are usually identified by the appearance of a continuous phase transition between locally ordered phases. Here, we reveal the presence of deconfined quantu… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 165142] Published Thu Apr 23, 2026
